title: Trims Fix
body:
A small resource pack for 1.19.4+ that just fixes all vanilla trim Z-fighting, with vanilla armor. It's built into the resource pack for [Trims Overhaul](https://modrinth.com/datapack/trims-overhaul), but I decided to also seperate it into a individual project with only the fix assuming some people may like it.

If you're experiencing an issue where the trim on leggings becomes invisible, make sure you don't have a pack that enables "trim decal", or remove the Iris mod. 

#### Join the [Discord](https://discord.gg/TsC8AnaZeV) if you have any suggestions or issues.
